revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-2-435

A device which changes the output of a transmitter from one value of amplitude or frequency to another in accordance with the intelligence to be transmitted.

Reference: I.R.E.

{{IALAFooter}}
